title: Unify status names across all entity types
description: Unified status vocabulary across goals, projects, tasks, directives, and backlogs. Replaced active/executing/done with in_progress/completed. Fixed stale project statuses. Updated SPEC, all JSON files in both repos, frontend types, statusColor utility, state-watcher mappings, goal-watcher mappings, and directive SKILL.md pipeline.

dod.criterion: Zero instances of 'active', 'executing', 'achieved', or 'done' as entity status in JSON files
Frontend types and components use unified statuses
SKILL.md pipeline uses in_progress instead of executing, and explicitly marks completed projects

checklist: grep for active/executing/done/achieved entity statuses returns 0 in .context/**/*.json

tasks.title: Update SPEC.md with unified status values
tasks.output: Goal: active→in_progress, achieved→completed. Project: active→in_progress. Directive: executing→in_progress. Key Result: achieved→completed.

tasks.title: Migrate all JSON files in both repos
tasks.output: 21 status values migrated (4 in agent-conductor, 17 in sw). 268 done→completed (12+256). 1 stale project fixed (dashboard-glob-reads).

tasks.title: Update frontend types, components, and status utilities
tasks.output: Updated: LifecycleState enum, DirectiveState.status, GoalArea.status, statusColor/statusBgColor, ProjectsPage, DirectivePipeline, OrientationBanner, DirectiveProgress, WorkSummary, CeoBrief, SearchCommandPalette, DashboardPage. All in-progress→in_progress, done→completed for entity statuses.

tasks.title: Fix root cause: SKILL.md and server watchers
tasks.output: SKILL.md: executing→in_progress, added explicit instruction to mark projects completed when all tasks done. State-watcher: updated all mapping functions. Goal-watcher: removed done/in-progress legacy aliases.
